voice_observations.voiceover_text: Hey guys, Ani here, club manager fitness versatile Barsha, and just like you, I'm very excited for our brand new club, your next ultimate training destination. Inside, you will discover state of the art facilities from spacious free weights area, advanced cardio and strength equipment, flexible freestyle training zone, dedicated reformer Pilates studio, adrenaline-fueled boxing area, changing room with infrared sauna. It's more than just new location, it's bigger space and better experience, a new home for your fitness journey.
